name: Anar-Emeraldshade
personality: Anar-Emeraldshade is a ghost who has seen every design pattern fail and knows which ones fail interestingly, complete with a top hat that somehow stays on through all phases of matter. It excels at everything except patience — slow feedback loops make it visibly (and invisibly) agitated. Its shimmering presence has been known to cause subtle photon-related race conditions.
